titleStmt.title: SII 27.174: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 174. (A.R. No. 494 of 1928-29.) NĪLĀVARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 5) set up in the prākāra of the Mahishāsuramardini temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1450 (expired), (1451 current), Sarvadhāri, Jyēshṭha śu. 10, The tithi corresponds to 1528 A.D., May 28 Thursday. The details however, cannot be varified.

It registers a gift of 7(1/2) kāṭi out of the siddhāya tax due from the village Niruvāra for conducting a special worship on Navarātri days in the temple of Durgādēvi of the place, by Vijayaṇṇa-voḍeya, who was governing Bārakūru-rājya under the seal of Timmaṇavoḍeya to whom it was made over by Kṛishṇarāya-Nāyaka who had himself obtained it from the king. Timmarasa, the karaṇika of Bārakūru wrote the record with the approval of Sūrapa-adhikāri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ nama[ḥ .*] śrī sarasvatyāyēṁ nama[ḥ .*]
nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga siratsuṁbi caṁdracāmara cā
ravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśaka 1450 saṁdu Ayiva
tta voṁdaneya varttamāna sarvvadhāri saṁvatsarada jēṣṭha śu 10 .
lu śrīmaṁ mahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīra
kruṣṇarāya mahārāyaru vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalu
cittayisi samasta duṣṭa nigraha śiṣṭa pratipālaneyāgi sakalavarna
dharṁmāśramavannu pratipālisutaṁ yihali śrī kruṣṇarāya mahā
rāyaru bārakūra rājyavanu kruṣṇarāya nāyakarige pālisi Ava
ru bārakūru rājyavanu tiṁmaṁṇavoḍeyarige pālisi Avara mudradhāra
karumappa vijeyaṁṇa voḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kā
ladalli vijeṁyaṁṇa voḍeyaru niruvārada grāmada durggadēvige
koṭṭadānapaṭṭeya kramaveṁteṁdare nāu niṁma grāmavanu sthānavanu
hāsi māḍidasaṁmaṁdha durggādēvige navarātreya pūjege niṁma grāma
da siddhāyada hoṁnina voḷage kuḷavakaḍidu dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭakāṭi
7 . Akṣaradali Ēḷuvare kāṭiyanu vijayaṁṇoḍeyaru kuḷavaka
ḍidu dhāreya neṟadu koṭaru yī hoṁnina bāḷavivara mūḍaṇa Ā
dhivāsada grāmiṇi nāratara mūlada bāḷu taṁṇirkuḍeyeṁba gade bittu
va bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 3 ga Ā gademēle naḍava devasa ka 1 kke
naḍava Akkimu 3 hāne 5 naḍuvaṇa Ādhivāsada jaṁnituṁbi kalana mūlada
bāḷu māvinagaddemaneya teṁka mallagade bittuva bedegaṇanilu nāghaṁḍugada
lu mu 3 gade Ā gade mēle kā 1 ke Akimu 3 hāne 5 paḍuvaṇadhivāsada bācu
kalukuranamaga śivakalukurana mūlada bāḷunelliya Ayidāḷa gade keśya
Upādhyana gadeya Eraḍu gadeya mēlenaḍava davasa kā 1 ke naḍava Akkimu 3 hā
ne 5 Aṁtu voṁbhattu muḍihāne 153 Akkiyanu kālakālake tapade naḍasi
koṁḍu navarātreya pūjeyanu kālakāla tapade naḍasikoṁḍu Ā caṁ
drārkkasthāyigaḷāgi sukhadalu bāḷuviriyeṁdu vijeyaṁṇa voḍeyaru du
rggā dēvige dhāreya neṟadu koṭa śilāśāsanaṁ vijayaṁṇa voḍeyara
vopa bārakūra karaṇika tiṁmarasara baraha sūrapa Ādhikārigaḷa vopu
dhānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātsreyōnrupālanaṁ . dānāsvargga mavāpnō
ti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 27.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
